verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Durable paths visible inside envelope; Writes persist across exit; Depends on [[tasks/yzx-iso/t3-0-lane-index]]; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.red_first: gates executed red against the pre-delivery surface (engine absent), green at HEAD (3/3)
gate_result.visibility_evidence: The real /home/flexnetos/meta/var binds into the envelope at /durable/meta-var; its lib tier (hosting the PostgreSQL/RuVector datadir) is listed from inside the envelope.
gate_result.persistence_evidence: A byte written inside the envelope onto a --durable bind survives envelope exit and is read back on the host (leakcheck clean afterward) — the durable plane is the persistence boundary, not the envelope.
gate_result.dependency_evidence: The bound durable roots are exactly the t3 tier map's durable entries: planning-spine-v0/docs/isolation_tier_map.json declares meta/var/lib/postgresql and the meta/var tier as durable targets; the spec asserts this linkage.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Real bind of meta/var, real write-through persistence on a durable bind, tier-map cross-check against the published T1 artifact.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-068 is complete: durable state binds into the sandbox — meta/var (including the lib tier that hosts the PostgreSQL/RuVector datadir) is visible inside the envelope, writes to durable binds persist across envelope exit, and the bound roots are exactly the durable entries the t3 tier map declares.
